understanding.goal_understanding: reach the + goal gem by navigating with horizontal moves and gravity-driven falling without hitting spikes/hazards
understanding.mechanics_understanding: MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT shifts x then auto-falls in current gravity (DOWN/UP) until solid tile/hazard/goal; CLICK removes breakable 'x' at target [x,y]; spikes kill; UNDO reverts last action; y increases downward
